name: met-system
description: MET — Sistema de gestión para cadena de gimnasios (monolito modular)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,socio,backoffice,kiosk,web -c magenta,cyan,green,yellow,blue "pnpm dev:api" "pnpm dev:socio" "pnpm dev:backoffice" "pnpm dev:kiosk" "pnpm dev:web"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @met/web build && pnpm --filter @met/socio build -- --base=/socio/ && pnpm --filter @met/backoffice build -- --base=/bo/ && pnpm --filter @met/kiosk build -- --base=/kiosk/
